body.body: Reactive habit pattern: trigger on open-ticket wondering ("what is left", "what is open", "what is pending", "what are my tickets"). code_ref = tool that reads queue.json, formats pending/blocked/in_progress tickets as a brief summary. Result pushed to TWM with short TTL (~120s). Igor wonders -> habit fires -> answer is in TWM before next cognition cycle. No polling. No stale memory. Same mechanism as PROC_WHAT_TIME. Also fixes the queue/memory divergence: Igor always gets live queue state, never his own (potentially stale) episodic recollection of what is open.
body.title: PROC_QUEUE_STATUS — reactive habit surfaces live queue on open-ticket wondering
body.result: Seeded PROC_QUEUE_STATUS reactive habit → check_worker_queue. Trigger: what's in the queue / open tickets / queue status.
